title: Untold Scandal
tmdbOverview: In late 1700s Korea, Lady Cho challenges the playboy Lord Jo-won into seducing and sleeping with her husband's coming young, virgin concubine. Lady Cho agrees to sleep with him if he succeeds.
synopsis: Untold Scandal (2003) is a drama, romance and k-drama film from South Korea. It carries a 6.8 rating on IMDb. It's one of the titles we feature across our 2000s and genre rankings. It carries a R18+ certification (JP rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
